statement: In every magma, Equation 1908 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (y * x)`) implies Equation 1734 (`x = (y * y) * ((y * z) * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0046
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op y x))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op y y) (op (op y z) x))
